zh.Goudhurst, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特古度爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Culpeper於1355年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的母親Elizabeth Hardreshull36歲，父親Sir John Culpeper51歲。他於大約1378年與Alianor de Grene在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年3月8日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Goudhurst, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特古度爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Culpeper于1355年出生在英国英格兰时，他的母亲Elizabeth Hardreshull36岁，父亲Sir John Culpeper51岁。他于大约1378年与Alianor de Grene在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1429年3月8日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Culpeper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): from Middle English cul(l)en, coilen ‘to cull, select, gather’ (Old French coillir, from Latin colligere ‘to collect or gather’) + pep(p)er ‘pepper’, probably an occupational name for a herbalist or spicer.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Culpeper was born in 1355, in England, United Kingdom, his mother, Elizabeth Hardreshull, was 36 and his father, Sir John Culpeper, was 51. He married Alianor de Grene about 1378, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 8 March 1429, in his hometown, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Culpeper est né en 1355, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, sa mère, Elizabeth Hardreshull, avait 36 ans et son père, Sir John Culpeper, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Alianor de Grene environ 1378, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 8 mars 1429, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Culpeper 1355 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Elizabeth Hardreshull 36 und sein Vater Sir John Culpeper 51. Er hat um 1378 in England Alianor de Grene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 8. März 1429 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Culpeper è nato il nel 1355 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo madre, Elizabeth Hardreshull, aveva 36 anni e il suo padre, Sir John Culpeper, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Alianor de Grene circa 1378, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 8 marzo 1429, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Culpeperが1355年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，母Elizabeth Hardreshullは36歳，父Sir John Culpeperは51歳であった。約1378年にイギリスでAlianor de Greneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年3月8日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Culpeper(이)가 1355년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hardreshull(은)는 36세였고, 그의 아버지 Sir John Culpeper(은)는 51세였다. 그는 대략 1378년 영국에서 Alianor de Grene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 3월 8일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Culpeper nasceu em 1355, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, sua mãe, Elizabeth Hardreshull, tinha 36 anos e seu pai, Sir John Culpeper, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianor de Grene aproximadamente 1378, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 8 de março de 1429, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Culpeper родился в 1355 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его матери по имени Elizabeth Hardreshull было 36 лет, а отцу, которого звали Sir John Culpeper, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianor de Grene около 1378 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 8 марта 1429 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Culpeper nació en 1355, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su mamá, Elizabeth Hardreshull, tenía 36 años y su papá, Sir John Culpeper, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Alianor de Grene aproximadamente 1378, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 8 de marzo de 1429, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
